verses.text: <ruby>保<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby>、<ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>拉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lā</rt></ruby>、<ruby>提<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tí</rt></ruby><ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mó</rt></ruby><ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tài</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>帖<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tiē</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>迦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby>。
愿Yuàn恩ēn惠huì、平pínɡ安ān从cónɡ父fù神Shén和hé主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū基Jī督dū归ɡuī与yǔ你nǐ们men！
弟Dì兄xiōnɡ们men，我wǒ们men该ɡāi为wèi你nǐ们men常chánɡ常chánɡ感ɡǎn谢xiè神Shén，这zhè本běn是shì合hé宜yí的de，因yīn你nǐ们men的de信xìn心xīn格ɡé外wài增zēnɡ长zhǎnɡ，并bìnɡ且qiě你nǐ们men众zhònɡ人rén彼bǐ此cǐ相xiānɡ爱ài的de心xīn也yě都dōu充chōnɡ足zú。
甚Shèn至zhì我wǒ们men在zài神Shén的de各ɡè教jiào会huì里lǐ为wèi你nǐ们men夸kuā口kǒu，都dōu因yīn你nǐ们men在zài所suǒ受shòu的de一yí切qiè逼bī迫pò患huàn难nàn中zhōnɡ，仍rénɡ旧jiù存cún忍rěn耐nài和hé信xìn心xīn。
这Zhè正zhènɡ是shì神Shén公ɡōnɡ义yì判pàn断duàn的de明mínɡ证zhènɡ，叫jiào你nǐ们men可kě算suàn配pèi得de神Shén的de国ɡuó，你nǐ们men就jiù是shì为wèi这zhè国ɡuó受shòu苦kǔ。
神Shén既jì是shì公ɡōnɡ义yì的de，就jiù必bì将jiānɡ患huàn难nàn报bào应yìnɡ那nà加jiā患huàn难nàn给ɡěi你nǐ们men的de人rén；
也yě必bì使shǐ你nǐ们men这zhè受shòu患huàn难nàn的de人rén与yǔ我wǒ们men同tónɡ得de平pínɡ安ān。那Nà时shí，主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū同tónɡ他tā有yǒu能nénɡ力lì的de天tiān使shǐ从cónɡ天tiān上shɑnɡ在zài火huǒ焰yàn中zhōnɡ显xiǎn现xiàn，

<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>报<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bào</rt></ruby><ruby>应<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>识<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shi</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>福<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>音<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>。
他Tā们men要yào受shòu刑xínɡ罚fá，就jiù是shì永yǒnɡ远yuǎn沉chén沦lún，离lí开kāi主zhǔ的de面miàn和hé他tā权quán能nénɡ的de荣rónɡ光ɡuānɡ。
这Zhè正zhènɡ是shì主zhǔ降jiànɡ临lín，要yào在zài他tā圣shènɡ徒tú的de身shēn上shɑnɡ得de荣rónɡ耀yào，又yòu在zài一yí切qiè信xìn的de人rén身shēn上shɑnɡ显xiǎn为wéi希xī奇qí的de那nà日rì子zi(我wǒ们men对duì你nǐ们men作zuò的de见jiàn证zhènɡ，你nǐ们men也yě信xìn了le)。

因Yīn此cǐ，我wǒ们men常chánɡ为wèi你nǐ们men祷dǎo告ɡào，愿yuàn我wǒ们men的de神Shén看kàn你nǐ们men配pèi得de过ɡuò所suǒ蒙ménɡ的de召zhào，又yòu用yònɡ大dà能nénɡ成chénɡ就jiù你nǐ们men一yí切qiè所suǒ羡xiàn慕mù的de良liánɡ善shàn和hé一yí切qiè因yīn信xìn心xīn所suǒ作zuò的de工ɡōnɡ夫fu，
叫jiào我wǒ们men主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū的de名mínɡ在zài你nǐ们men身shēn上shɑnɡ得de荣rónɡ耀yào，你nǐ们men也yě在zài他tā身shēn上shɑnɡ得de荣rónɡ耀yào，都dōu照zhào着zhe我wǒ们men的de神Shén并bìnɡ主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū基Jī督dū的de恩ēn。
弟Dì兄xiōnɡ们men，论lùn到dào我wǒ们men主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū基Jī督dū降jiànɡ临lín和hé我wǒ们men到dào他tā那nà里li聚jù集jí，
我wǒ劝quàn你nǐ们men，无wú论lùn有yǒu灵línɡ、有yǒu言yán语yu、有yǒu冒mào我wǒ名mínɡ的de书shū信xìn，说shuō主zhǔ的de日rì子zi现xiàn在zài到dào了le(“现Xiàn在zài”或huò作zuò“就Jiù”)，不bú要yào轻qīnɡ易yi动dònɡ心xīn，也yě不bú要yào惊jīnɡ慌huānɡ。
人Rén不bù拘jū用yònɡ什shén么me法fǎ子zi，你nǐ们men总zǒnɡ不bú要yào被bèi他tā诱yòu惑huò。因Yīn为wèi那nà日rì子zi以yǐ前qián，必bì有yǒu离lí道dào反fǎn教jiào的de事shì，并bìnɡ有yǒu那nà大dà罪zuì人rén，就jiù是shì沉chén沦lún之zhī子zǐ，显xiǎn露lù出chū来lɑi。
他Tā是shì抵dǐ挡dǎnɡ主zhǔ，高ɡāo抬tái自zì己jǐ，超chāo过ɡuò一yí切qiè称chēnɡ为wéi神Shén的de和hé一yí切qiè受shòu人rén敬jìnɡ拜bài的de，甚shèn至zhì坐zuò在zài神Shén的de殿diàn里lǐ自zì称chēnɡ是shì神Shén。
我Wǒ还hái在zài你nǐ们men那nà里li的de时shí候hou，曾cénɡ把bǎ这zhè些xiē事shì告ɡào诉su你nǐ们men，你nǐ们men不bú记jì得de吗mɑ？
现Xiàn在zài你nǐ们men也yě知zhī道dɑo，那nà拦lán阻zǔ他tā的de是shì什shén么me，是shì叫jiào他tā到dào了le的de时shí候hou，才cái可kě以yǐ显xiǎn露lù。
因Yīn为wèi那nà不bù法fǎ的de隐yǐn意yì已yǐ经jinɡ发fā动dònɡ，只zhǐ是shì现xiàn在zài有yǒu一yí个ɡè拦lán阻zǔ的de，等děnɡ到dào那nà拦lán阻zǔ的de被bèi除chú去qù，
那Nà时shí这zhè不bù法fǎ的de人rén必bì显xiǎn露lù出chū来lɑi，主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū要yào用yònɡ口kǒu中zhōnɡ的de气qì灭miè绝jué他tā，用yònɡ降jiànɡ临lín的de荣rónɡ光ɡuānɡ废fèi掉diào他tā。
这Zhè不bù法fǎ的de人rén来lái，是shì照zhào撒sā但dàn的de运yùn动dònɡ，行xínɡ各ɡè样yànɡ的de异yì能nénɡ、神Shén迹jì和hé一yí切qiè虚xū假jiǎ的de奇qí事shì，
并Bìnɡ且qiě在zài那nà沉chén沦lún的de人rén身shēn上shɑnɡ行xínɡ各ɡè样yànɡ出chū于yú不bú义yì的de诡ɡuǐ诈zhà，因yīn他tā们men不bù领lǐnɡ受shòu爱ài真zhēn理lǐ的de心xīn，使shǐ他tā们men得dé救jiù。
故Gù此cǐ，神Shén就jiù给ɡěi他tā们men一yí个ɡè生shēnɡ发fā错cuò误wù的de心xīn，叫jiào他tā们men信xìn从cónɡ虚xū谎huǎnɡ，

<ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>定<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuì</rt></ruby>。

主Zhǔ所suǒ爱ài的de弟dì兄xiōnɡ们men哪nǎ，我wǒ们men本běn该ɡāi常chánɡ为wèi你nǐ们men感ɡǎn谢xiè神Shén，因yīn为wèi他tā从cónɡ起qǐ初chū拣jiǎn选xuǎn了le你nǐ们men，叫jiào你nǐ们men因yīn信xìn真zhēn道dào，又yòu被bèi圣shènɡ灵línɡ感ɡǎn动dònɡ，成chénɡ为wéi圣shènɡ洁jié，能nénɡ以yǐ得dé救jiù。
神Shén藉jiè我wǒ们men所suǒ传chuán的de福fú音yīn召zhào你nǐ们men到dào这zhè地dì步bù，好hǎo得dé着zhe我wǒ们men主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū基Jī督dū的de荣rónɡ光ɡuānɡ。
所Suǒ以yǐ，弟dì兄xiōnɡ们men，你nǐ们men要yào站zhàn立lì得de稳wěn，凡fán所suǒ领lǐnɡ受shòu的de教jiào训xun，不bù拘jū是shì我wǒ们men口kǒu传chuán的de，是shì信xìn上shànɡ写xiě的de，都dōu要yào坚jiān守shǒu。
但Dàn愿yuàn我wǒ们men主zhǔ耶Yē稣sū基Jī督dū和hé那nà爱ài我wǒ们men、开kāi恩ēn将jiānɡ永yǒnɡ远yuǎn的de安ān慰wèi并bìnɡ美měi好hǎo的de盼pàn望wànɡ赐cì给ɡěi我wǒ们men的de父fù神Shén，
安ān慰wèi你nǐ们men的de心xīn，并bìnɡ且qiě在zài一yí切qiè善shàn行xínɡ善shàn言yán上shànɡ坚jiān固ɡù你nǐ们men。
弟Dì兄xiōnɡ们men，我wǒ还hái有yǒu话huà说shuō：请qǐnɡ你nǐ们men为wèi我wǒ们men祷dǎo告ɡào，好hǎo叫jiào主zhǔ的de道dào理li快kuài快kuài行xínɡ开kāi，得dé着zhe荣rónɡ耀yào，正zhènɡ如rú在zài你nǐ们men中zhōnɡ间jiān一yí样yànɡ；
也yě叫jiào我wǒ们men脱tuō离lí无wú理lǐ之zhī恶è人rén的de手shǒu，因yīn为wèi人rén不bù都dōu是shì有yǒu信xìn心xīn。
但Dàn主zhǔ是shì信xìn实shí的de，要yào坚jiān固ɡù你nǐ们men，保bǎo护hù你nǐ们men脱tuō离lí那nà恶è者zhě(或huò作zuò“脱Tuō离lí凶xiōnɡ恶è”)。
我Wǒ们men靠kào主zhǔ深shēn信xìn，你nǐ们men现xiàn在zài是shì遵zūn行xínɡ我wǒ们men所suǒ吩fēn咐fu的de，后hòu来lái也yě必bì要yào遵zūn行xínɡ。
愿Yuàn主zhǔ引yǐn导dǎo你nǐ们men的de心xīn，叫jiào你nǐ们men爱ài神Shén，并bìnɡ学xué基Jī督dū的de忍rěn耐nài。圣shènɡ徒tú有yǒu规ɡuī范fàn的de生shēnɡ活huó

<ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>：<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>规<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>矩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ju</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>遵<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zūn</rt></ruby><ruby>守<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>训<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xun</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>原<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>应<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>效<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiào</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>。<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>尝<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>规<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>矩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ju</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>尝<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>白<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bái</rt></ruby><ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>饭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fàn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>辛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>苦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>劳<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">láo</rt></ruby><ruby>碌<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>昼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhòu</rt></ruby><ruby>夜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yè</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>免<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">miǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>累<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lěi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>权<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>柄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǐnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>榜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>效<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiào</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>肯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kěn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>饭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fàn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>规<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>矩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ju</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby>，<ruby>反<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>专<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhuān</rt></ruby><ruby>管<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>闲<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xián</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>靠<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kào</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby>，<ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fu</rt></ruby>、<ruby>劝<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">quàn</rt></ruby><ruby>戒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>静<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>饭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fàn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>善<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shàn</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>丧<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>志<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>记<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>交<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiāo</rt></ruby><ruby>往<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>觉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jué</rt></ruby><ruby>羞<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiū</rt></ruby><ruby>愧<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuì</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>仇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chóu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>劝<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">quàn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>结<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lùn</rt></ruby>
